classifications.name: Core
classifications.definition: Normative sovereign architecture, vocabulary, invariants, and boundaries owned by the AAOS RFC series.
may_not: delegate sovereign invariants to provider/runtime behavior

classifications.name: Extension
classifications.definition: A declared addition using an explicit Core extension point without collision or semantic override.

classifications.name: Profile
classifications.definition: A bounded specialization of Core for a domain, deployment class, assurance level, or interoperability target.

classifications.name: Runtime
classifications.definition: An implementation or execution environment that realizes bounded behavior under applicable AAOS contracts.

classifications.name: Public Projection
classifications.definition: A bounded public representation of architecture, evidence, claims, or conformance that excludes protected sovereign implementation detail.
must: avoid inference of undisclosed private state

classifications.name: Private Sovereign Implementation
classifications.definition: Non-public institutional doctrine, authority material, protected implementation, operational policy, and evidence subject to sovereign control.
must: remain abstracted or blocked when unavailable
use authenticated bounded interfaces for mediated effects
may_not: be inferred from public repository metadata

relationship_rules.constraint: private existence not proven by public projection

claim_rules: classification labels are orthogonal to lifecycle status
classification labels do not grant Authority
implementation existence does not prove conformance
public projection does not prove private sovereign implementation
profile conformance does not imply unrestricted Core conformance
extension adoption does not promote an extension into Core
